allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in d['dependencies'].items\(\) if 'react-native' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ESLint version:', d['version']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('reanimated version:', d['version']\); print\('babel plugin:', d.get\('main',''\)\)")
